meta.title: Jonathan Brownstein — AI-Enhanced Business Analytics Instructor
meta.description: Part-time workforce instructor proposal for McHenry County College: AI-Enhanced Business Analytics, taught by a senior data analyst with fifteen years of industry practice in SQL, BI, and responsible AI.

hero.description: Senior data analyst and applied AI practitioner proposing a part-time workforce course for McHenry County College: AI-Enhanced Business Analytics. Fifteen years translating business questions into reliable analytics, reporting, and decision support—SQL, BI dashboards, statistical modeling, machine learning, and generative AI used daily in professional work. Emphasizes validation, data quality, and responsible AI. Available evenings, weekends, open enrollment, customized employer training, or adjunct-style delivery alongside full-time industry work.

highlights.label: Business and data analytics · SQL and database fundamentals · Power BI and data storytelling · generative AI for analysts · prompt engineering · AI-assisted data preparation and reporting · requirements documentation · process automation · responsible AI and data privacy · adult learner curriculum design · hands-on lab instruction · stakeholder communication · capstone coaching

items.title: Senior Data Analyst III
items.organization: Hannover Life Reassurance Company of America
items.context: Enterprise data science · ML architecture · AI-assisted analytics · 2019 – Present
bullets: Apply SQL, statistical modeling, machine learning, and AI-assisted workflows to actuarial, finance, and enterprise data processes in a Chief Data Office setting.
Design analytics stakeholders can trust: clear requirements, validated outputs, documented methods, and executive-ready recommendations.
Built forecasting, classification, and outlier-detection solutions recognized at senior leadership; emphasize accuracy, governance, and explainability.
Coach teammates on SQL, visualization, and safe AI use—mirroring the teach-then-validate habit central to workforce training.
Create reusable reference assets (metadata, lineage, valuation frameworks) that help others learn systems and reduce tribal knowledge.

items.title: Assistant Business Controller
items.context: Cross-functional reporting · KPI design · process documentation · 2012 – 2018
bullets: Led reporting modernization for HR, Sales, Marketing, and executives—bridging business need and technical delivery for mixed skill-level teams.
Built automated reporting frameworks and turned ambiguous requests into scoped KPIs, reports, and process documentation managers could actually use.

groups.title: Analytics
items: SQL, Excel, Power BI, Tableau, SSRS, statistical modeling, applied econometrics, machine learning fundamentals

groups.title: AI tools
items: ChatGPT, Claude, Microsoft Copilot, Google Gemini, AI coding assistants (practical professional use)

groups.title: Instruction
items: module design for working adults, live demonstration, assigned practice, output validation, clear written materials
